name: Domo AI Agent Builder
description: Platform for building custom AI agents with integrated data connectors and enterprise data access. Agents can query datasets, trigger workflows, create dashboards, and configure alerts with governed, trusted business data.
capabilities: Access external APIs via JSON connector
Interact with external AI platforms (OpenAI, Google, Anthropic)
notes: Launched March 25, 2026. Includes Domo MCP Server for external AI platform integration (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude). Connects to Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, AWS. Domo Documents for unstructured data. JSON No Code connector with AI Assistant expected later in 2026.
